channel.title: Data Engineering on Gilbert N. Onyenwezi | Operations leader, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Data Engineering on Gilbert N. Onyenwezi | Operations leader, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence Portfolio

item.title: ERP-Ready Data Pipeline for Operations
item.description:
Problem

Operational data is often fragmented across systems, making it difficult to generate consistent, reliable insights.

Objective

Design a data pipeline that cleans and standardizes operational data and supports integration with ERP platforms.

Tools

SQL, Python, Data Modeling

item.title: Projects
item.description:
Projects

This portfolio focuses on work at the intersection of operations, analytics, quality, and data systems.
